title: Itinera
description: A mobile app that generates personalized travel itineraries based on user preferences and unique local experiences.
onboardingSubText: Browse personalized itineraries or let us craft the perfect trip based on your interests and travel style.
createSubText: Build your perfect itinerary in minutes. Select activities, set your pace, and let Itinera organize your day with authentic local experiences.
detailSubText: Find activities that match your interests. From historical landmarks to cultural hotspots, discover what makes each destination truly special.
techDescription: The app is built using React Native and Expo for a smooth cross platform mobile experience, with Node.js and Express handling the backend logic, MySQL managing data storage, and Tailwind powering a clean and consistent UI design.
long_description: Itinera is a personalized travel itinerary planner designed for experiential tourism. Travelers select their preferred city and activities, and the system creates a dynamic itinerary using meaningful local experiences uploaded by creators. The app makes trip planning easier while helping users discover authentic and memorable activities in their chosen destination.

title: Hakban
description: A simple, login-less Kanban board for tracking job applications with speed and clarity.
onboardingSubText: Visualize your job search in one place. Move applications across stages and keep track of your progress at a glance.
createSubText: No setup, no login. Focus on tracking your applications so you can spend more time applying and less time managing tools.
detailSubText: A ready-made Kanban board built specifically for job tracking, so you don’t have to set up your own system.
techDescription: Hakban is built as a lightweight web application focused on speed and simplicity. It uses React and Vite for a fast frontend experience, Tailwind CSS for a clean UI, and local storage to persist data instantly without requiring a backend.
long_description: Hakban is a lightweight job application tracker designed for simplicity and instant use. Users can organize their applications using a Kanban-style board without needing to create an account or set up a system. It helps job seekers stay organized across different stages of the application process while keeping everything fast, minimal, and distraction-free.

title: ShareBasket
description: A simple grocery list app perfect for families, couples, and friends. It features real-time family sharing so everyone stays updated on what to buy.
onboardingSubText: Create shared grocery lists that sync instantly across all devices. Never miss an item or double-buy again.
createSubText: Add items, organize by category, and check them off as you shop. Our intuitive interface makes list management effortless.
detailSubText: Share your lists with family members instantly. Everyone sees updates in real-time, making grocery shopping a truly collaborative experience.
long_description: ShareBasket is a collaborative grocery list application designed to make shopping easier for families, couples, and groups. It includes a seamless sharing feature that allows multiple users to access and update the same grocery list in real time—ensuring no item is forgotten and everyone stays in sync. Built with React native, the app provides a clean, intuitive interface with smooth navigation.
